1→"""Linear pipeline for PR submission.
     2→
     3→Replaces the dual-path branching orchestration with a sequence of plain
     4→functions transforming a frozen SubmitState dataclass.
     5→
     6→Each step: (ErkContext, SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError
     7→"""
     8→
     9→import dataclasses
    10→import sys
    11→import uuid
    12→from collections.abc import Callable
    13→from dataclasses import dataclass
    14→from functools import cache
    15→from pathlib import Path
    16→
    17→import click
    18→
    19→from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import (
    20→    assemble_pr_body,
    21→    echo_plan_context_status,
    22→    maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl,
    23→    run_commit_message_generation,
    24→)
    25→from erk.cli.constants import PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX
    26→from erk.cli.ensure import UserFacingCliError
    27→from erk.core.commit_message_generator import CommitMessageGenerator
    28→from erk.core.context import ErkContext
    29→from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext, PlanContextProvider
    30→from erk_shared.gateway.git.remote_ops.types import PullRebaseError, PushError
    31→from erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing import parse_git_remote_url
    32→from erk_shared.gateway.github.pr_footer import build_pr_body_footer
    33→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import BodyText, GitHubRepoId, PRNotFound
    34→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.operations.finalize import ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL, is_learn_plan
    35→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.prompts import truncate_diff
    36→from erk_shared.gateway.pr.diff_extraction import filter_diff_excluded_files
    37→from erk_shared.gateway.pr.graphite_enhance import should_enhance_with_graphite
    38→from erk_shared.impl_folder import (
    39→    has_plan_ref,
    40→    save_plan_ref,
    41→    validate_plan_linkage,
    42→)
    43→from erk_shared.scratch.scratch import write_scratch_file
    44→
    45→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46→# Utilities
    47→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    48→
    49→
    50→def _add_planned_prefix(title: str) -> str:
    51→    """Prepend 'plnd/' prefix to PR title (idempotent).
    52→
    53→    Args:
    54→        title: The PR title to prefix
    55→
    56→    Returns:
    57→        The title with 'plnd/' prefix, skipping if already prefixed
    58→    """
    59→    if title.startswith(PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX):
    60→        return title
    61→    return f"{PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX}{title}"
    62→
    63→
    64→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65→# Data Types
    66→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    67→
    68→
    69→@dataclass(frozen=True)
    70→class SubmitState:
    71→    """Immutable state threaded through the submit pipeline."""
    72→
    73→    cwd: Path
    74→    repo_root: Path
    75→    branch_name: str
    76→    parent_branch: str
    77→    trunk_branch: str
    78→    use_graphite: bool
    79→    force: bool
    80→    debug: bool
    81→    session_id: str
    82→    skip_description: bool
    83→    quiet: bool
    84→    plan_id: str | None
    85→    pr_number: int | None
    86→    pr_url: str | None
    87→    was_created: bool
    88→    base_branch: str | None
    89→    graphite_url: str | None
    90→    diff_file: Path | None
    91→    plan_context: PlanContext | None
    92→    title: str | None
    93→    body: str | None
    94→    existing_pr_body: str
    95→
    96→
    97→@dataclass(frozen=True)
    98→class SubmitError:
    99→    """Error result from a pipeline step."""
   100→
   101→    phase: str
   102→    error_type: str
   103→    message: str
   104→    details: dict[str, str]
   105→
   106→
   107→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   108→# Pipeline Steps
   109→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   110→
   111→SubmitStep = Callable[[ErkContext, SubmitState], SubmitState | SubmitError]
   112→
   113→
   114→def prepare_state(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   115→    """Resolve repo_root, branch_name, parent_branch, trunk_branch, plan_id.
   116→
   117→    Single location for all discovery. Consolidates duplicate parent-branch
   118→    and plan-id discovery sites.
   119→    """
   120→    cwd = state.cwd
   121→    repo_root = ctx.git.repo.get_repository_root(cwd)
   122→
   123→    branch_name = ctx.git.branch.get_current_branch(cwd)
   124→    if branch_name is None:
   125→        return SubmitError(
   126→            phase="prepare",
   127→            error_type="no_branch",
   128→            message="Not on a branch (detached HEAD state)",
   129→            details={},
   130→        )
   131→
   132→    trunk_branch = ctx.git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo_root)
   133→    parent_branch = ctx.branch_manager.get_parent_branch(repo_root, branch_name) or trunk_branch
   134→
   135→    # Plan ID discovery via .impl/plan-ref.json (or legacy issue.json) or branch name
   136→    impl_dir = cwd / ".impl"
   137→    plan_id: str | None = None
   138→    try:
   139→        plan_id = validate_plan_linkage(impl_dir, branch_name)
   140→    except ValueError as e:
   141→        return SubmitError(
   142→            phase="prepare",
   143→            error_type="issue_linkage_mismatch",
   144→            message=str(e),
   145→            details={"branch": branch_name},
   146→        )
   147→
   148→    # Auto-repair: create .impl/plan-ref.json if missing but issue inferred from branch
   149→    if plan_id is not None and not has_plan_ref(impl_dir) and impl_dir.exists():
   150→        remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(repo_root, "origin")
   151→        owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
   152→        issue_url = f"https://github.com/{owner}/{repo_name}/issues/{plan_id}"
   153→        save_plan_ref(
   154→            impl_dir,
   155→            provider="github",
   156→            plan_id=plan_id,
   157→            url=issue_url,
   158→            labels=(),
   159→            objective_id=None,
   160→        )
   161→
   162→    return dataclasses.replace(
   163→        state,
   164→        cwd=cwd,
   165→        repo_root=repo_root,
   166→        branch_name=branch_name,
   167→        parent_branch=parent_branch,
   168→        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
   169→        plan_id=plan_id,
   170→    )
   171→
   172→
   173→def commit_wip(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   174→    """Check for uncommitted changes; if present, add_all + commit."""
   175→    if ctx.git.status.has_uncommitted_changes(state.cwd):
   176→        if not state.quiet:
   177→            click.echo(click.style("   Committing uncommitted changes...", dim=True))
   178→        ctx.git.commit.add_all(state.cwd)
   179→        ctx.git.commit.commit(state.cwd, "WIP: Prepare for PR submission")
   180→    return state
   181→
   182→
   183→def capture_existing_pr_body(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   184→    """Capture full PR body before gt submit overwrites it."""
   185→    pr_result = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
   186→    if isinstance(pr_result, PRNotFound):
   187→        return state
   188→    if not pr_result.body:
   189→        return state
   190→    return dataclasses.replace(state, existing_pr_body=pr_result.body)
   191→
   192→
   193→def push_and_create_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   194→    """Push branch and create/find PR.
   195→
   196→    Dispatches internally: Graphite-first vs core path.
   197→    """
   198→    # Determine if Graphite should handle the push
   199→    graphite_handles_push = (
   200→        state.use_graphite and should_enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state.cwd).should_enhance
   201→    )
   202→
   203→    if graphite_handles_push:
   204→        return _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
   205→    return _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)
   206→
   207→
   208→def _graphite_first_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   209→    """Graphite-first flow: gt submit handles push + PR creation."""
   210→    if not state.quiet:
   211→        click.echo(click.style("Phase 1: Graphite Submit", bold=True))
   212→
   213→    # Auto-force for plan implementations (branches always diverge from remote)
   214→    is_plan_impl = state.plan_id is not None
   215→    effective_force = state.force or is_plan_impl
   216→
   217→    # Pre-check: detect remote divergence before gt submit
   218→    if ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(state.repo_root, "origin", state.branch_name):
   219→        ctx.git.remote.fetch_branch(state.repo_root, "origin", state.branch_name)
   220→        divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
   221→            state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
   222→        )
   223→        if divergence.behind > 0 and not effective_force:
   224→            ahead_msg = (
   225→                f" and ahead by {divergence.ahead} commit(s)" if divergence.ahead > 0 else ""
   226→            )
   227→            return SubmitError(
   228→                phase="push_and_create_pr",
   229→                error_type="remote_diverged",
   230→                message=(
   231→                    f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' is behind remote by "
   232→                    f"{divergence.behind} commit(s){ahead_msg}.\n\n"
   233→                    "The remote branch has been updated (e.g., by CI or another session).\n\n"
   234→                    "To fix:\n"
   235→                    "  erk pr reconcile-with-remote --dangerous  # Reconcile with remote\n"
   236→                    "  erk pr submit -f                          # Force push"
   237→                ),
   238→                details={
   239→                    "branch": state.branch_name,
   240→                    "ahead": str(divergence.ahead),
   241→                    "behind": str(divergence.behind),
   242→                },
   243→            )
   244→        if is_plan_impl and not state.force and divergence.behind > 0:
   245→            if not state.quiet:
   246→                click.echo(click.style("   Auto-forcing: plan implementation branch", dim=True))
   247→
   248→    if not state.quiet:
   249→        click.echo(click.style("   Running gt submit...", dim=True))
   250→    sys.stdout.flush()
   251→    try:
   252→        ctx.graphite.submit_stack(
   253→            state.repo_root,
   254→            publish=True,
   255→            restack=False,
   256→            quiet=state.quiet,
   257→            force=effective_force,
   258→        )
   259→    except RuntimeError as e:
   260→        error_str = str(e)
   261→        if "restack" in error_str.lower():
   262→            return SubmitError(
   263→                phase="push_and_create_pr",
   264→                error_type="graphite_restack_required",
   265→                message=(
   266→                    "Your Graphite stack has conflicts that need manual resolution.\n\n"
   267→                    "Run these commands:\n"
   268→                    "  gt restack        # Resolve conflicts interactively\n"
   269→                    "  erk pr submit     # Re-submit after resolving"
   270→                ),
   271→                details={},
   272→            )
   273→        return SubmitError(
   274→            phase="push_and_create_pr",
   275→            error_type="graphite_submit_failed",
   276→            message=f"Graphite submit failed: {e}",
   277→            details={},
   278→        )
   279→    if not state.quiet:
   280→        click.echo(click.style("   Graphite submit completed", fg="green"))
   281→        click.echo("")
   282→
   283→    # Query GitHub for PR info
   284→    if not state.quiet:
   285→        click.echo(click.style("   Getting PR info...", dim=True))
   286→    pr_info = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
   287→    if isinstance(pr_info, PRNotFound):
   288→        return SubmitError(
   289→            phase="push_and_create_pr",
   290→            error_type="pr_not_found",
   291→            message=(
   292→                f"PR not found for branch '{state.branch_name}' after gt submit.\n"
   293→                "This may happen if gt submit didn't create a PR. Try running:\n"
   294→                "  gt submit --publish"
   295→            ),
   296→            details={"branch": state.branch_name},
   297→        )
   298→
   299→    # Get Graphite URL
   300→    remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(state.repo_root, "origin")
   301→    owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
   302→    repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
   303→    graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, pr_info.number)
   304→
   305→    if not state.quiet:
   306→        click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_info.number} ready", fg="green"))
   307→        click.echo("")
   308→
   309→    return dataclasses.replace(
   310→        state,
   311→        pr_number=pr_info.number,
   312→        pr_url=pr_info.url,
   313→        was_created=True,
   314→        base_branch=state.parent_branch,
   315→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
   316→    )
   317→
   318→
   319→def _core_submit_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   320→    """Core submit flow: git push + gh pr create."""
   321→    if not state.quiet:
   322→        click.echo(click.style("Phase 1: Creating or Updating PR", bold=True))
   323→
   324→    # Check GitHub authentication
   325→    is_gh_authed, gh_username, _ = ctx.github.check_auth_status()
   326→    if not is_gh_authed:
   327→        return SubmitError(
   328→            phase="push_and_create_pr",
   329→            error_type="github_auth_failed",
   330→            message="GitHub CLI is not authenticated. Run 'gh auth login'.",
   331→            details={},
   332→        )
   333→    if state.debug and not state.quiet:
   334→        click.echo(click.style(f"   Authenticated as {gh_username}", dim=True))
   335→
   336→    # Verify commits to push
   337→    commit_count = ctx.git.analysis.count_commits_ahead(state.cwd, state.parent_branch)
   338→    if commit_count == 0:
   339→        return SubmitError(
   340→            phase="push_and_create_pr",
   341→            error_type="no_commits",
   342→            message=f"No commits ahead of {state.parent_branch}. Nothing to submit.",
   343→            details={"parent_branch": state.parent_branch, "branch": state.branch_name},
   344→        )
   345→
   346→    # Divergence check and auto-rebase
   347→    divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
   348→        state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
   349→    )
   350→    if divergence.behind > 0:
   351→        if state.debug and not state.quiet:
   352→            click.echo(
   353→                click.style(
   354→                    f"   Branch is {divergence.behind} commit(s) behind remote, rebasing...",
   355→                    dim=True,
   356→                )
   357→            )
   358→        pull_result = ctx.git.remote.pull_rebase(state.cwd, "origin", state.branch_name)
   359→        if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError):
   360→            return SubmitError(
   361→                phase="push_and_create_pr",
   362→                error_type="rebase_failed",
   363→                message=(
   364→                    f"Failed to rebase '{state.branch_name}' on origin.\n"
   365→                    f"Error: {pull_result.message}\n\n"
   366→                    f"To fix manually: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}"
   367→                ),
   368→                details={"branch": state.branch_name},
   369→            )
   370→        divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
   371→            state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
   372→        )
   373→
   374→    if divergence.is_diverged and not state.force:
   375→        return SubmitError(
   376→            phase="push_and_create_pr",
   377→            error_type="branch_diverged",
   378→            message=(
   379→                f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' has diverged from remote.\n"
   380→                f"Local is {divergence.ahead} commit(s) ahead and "
   381→                f"{divergence.behind} commit(s) behind origin/{state.branch_name}.\n\n"
   382→                f"To fix: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}\n"
   383→                f"Or use: erk pr submit -f (to force push)"
   384→            ),
   385→            details={
   386→                "branch": state.branch_name,
   387→                "ahead": str(divergence.ahead),
   388→                "behind": str(divergence.behind),
   389→            },
   390→        )
   391→
   392→    # Push
   393→    push_result = ctx.git.remote.push_to_remote(
   394→        state.cwd, "origin", state.branch_name, set_upstream=True, force=state.force
   395→    )
   396→    if isinstance(push_result, PushError):
   397→        if "non-fast-forward" in push_result.message or "rejected" in push_result.message.lower():
   398→            return SubmitError(
   399→                phase="push_and_create_pr",
   400→                error_type="branch_diverged",
   401→                message=(
   402→                    f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' has diverged from remote.\n"
   403→                    f"Your local branch is behind origin/{state.branch_name}.\n\n"
   404→                    f"To fix: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}\n"
   405→                    f"Or use: erk pr submit -f (to force push)"
   406→                ),
   407→                details={"branch": state.branch_name},
   408→            )
   409→        raise UserFacingCliError(push_result.message)
   410→
   411→    # Check for existing PR or create new one
   412→    existing_pr = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
   413→
   414→    if isinstance(existing_pr, PRNotFound):
   415→        # Check parent branch has PR (stacked PRs)
   416→        if state.parent_branch != state.trunk_branch:
   417→            parent_pr = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.parent_branch)
   418→            if isinstance(parent_pr, PRNotFound):
   419→                return SubmitError(
   420→                    phase="push_and_create_pr",
   421→                    error_type="parent_branch_no_pr",
   422→                    message=(
   423→                        f"Cannot create PR: parent branch '{state.parent_branch}' "
   424→                        f"does not have a PR yet.\n\n"
   425→                        f"This branch is part of a Graphite stack. Use 'gt submit' "
   426→                        f"to submit the entire stack at once, which will create PRs "
   427→                        f"for all branches in the correct order.\n\n"
   428→                        f"Run: gt submit -s"
   429→                    ),
   430→                    details={
   431→                        "branch": state.branch_name,
   432→                        "parent_branch": state.parent_branch,
   433→                    },
   434→                )
   435→
   436→        # Build initial PR body with footer
   437→        footer = build_pr_body_footer(0)
   438→        full_body = "" + footer
   439→
   440→        pr_number = ctx.github.create_pr(
   441→            state.repo_root,
   442→            branch=state.branch_name,
   443→            title="WIP",
   444→            body=full_body,
   445→            base=state.parent_branch,
   446→        )
   447→
   448→        # Get PR URL
   449→        pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, pr_number)
   450→        pr_url = (
   451→            pr_details.url
   452→            if not isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound)
   453→            else f"https://github.com/{state.branch_name}/pull/{pr_number}"
   454→        )
   455→
   456→        # Update footer with actual PR number
   457→        updated_footer = build_pr_body_footer(pr_number)
   458→        ctx.github.update_pr_body(state.repo_root, pr_number, "" + updated_footer)
   459→
   460→        if not state.quiet:
   461→            click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_number} created", fg="green"))
   462→            click.echo("")
   463→
   464→        return dataclasses.replace(
   465→            state,
   466→            pr_number=pr_number,
   467→            pr_url=pr_url,
   468→            was_created=True,
   469→            base_branch=state.parent_branch,
   470→        )
   471→
   472→    # PR exists
   473→    pr_number = existing_pr.number
   474→    pr_url = existing_pr.url
   475→
   476→    # Add footer if missing
   477→    pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, pr_number)
   478→    current_body = "" if isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound) else pr_details.body
   479→    has_footer = "erk pr checkout" in current_body
   480→    if not has_footer:
   481→        footer = build_pr_body_footer(pr_number)
   482→        ctx.github.update_pr_body(state.repo_root, pr_number, current_body + footer)
   483→
   484→    if not state.quiet:
   485→        click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_number} found (already exists)", fg="green"))
   486→        click.echo("")
   487→
   488→    return dataclasses.replace(
   489→        state,
   490→        pr_number=pr_number,
   491→        pr_url=pr_url,
   492→        was_created=False,
   493→        base_branch=state.parent_branch,
   494→    )
   495→
   496→
   497→def extract_diff(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   498→    """Local git diff to base branch, filter lock files, truncate, write scratch file."""
   499→    if state.skip_description:
   500→        return state
   501→    click.echo(click.style("Phase 2: Getting diff", bold=True))
   502→
   503→    if state.base_branch is None:
   504→        return SubmitError(
   505→            phase="extract_diff",
   506→            error_type="no_base_branch",
   507→            message="No base branch determined for diff extraction",
   508→            details={},
   509→        )
   510→
   511→    pr_diff = ctx.git.analysis.get_diff_to_branch(state.cwd, state.base_branch)
   512→    if state.debug:
   513→        diff_lines = len(pr_diff.splitlines())
   514→        click.echo(click.style(f"   Diff retrieved ({diff_lines} lines)", dim=True))
   515→
   516→    # Filter lock files, truncate
   517→    pr_diff = filter_diff_excluded_files(pr_diff)
   518→    diff_content, was_truncated = truncate_diff(pr_diff)
   519→    if was_truncated and state.debug:
   520→        click.echo(click.style("   Diff truncated for size", dim=True))
   521→
   522→    # Write scratch file
   523→    diff_file = write_scratch_file(
   524→        diff_content,
   525→        session_id=state.session_id,
   526→        suffix=".diff",
   527→        prefix="pr-diff-",
   528→        repo_root=state.repo_root,
   529→    )
   530→
   531→    click.echo("")
   532→
   533→    return dataclasses.replace(state, diff_file=diff_file)
   534→
   535→
   536→def fetch_plan_context(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   537→    """Fetch plan context from linked erk-plan issue."""
   538→    if state.skip_description:
   539→        return state
   540→    click.echo(click.style("Phase 3: Fetching plan context", bold=True))
   541→
   542→    plan_provider = PlanContextProvider(
   543→        plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend, github_issues=ctx.github_issues
   544→    )
   545→    plan_context = plan_provider.get_plan_context(
   546→        repo_root=state.repo_root,
   547→        branch_name=state.branch_name,
   548→    )
   549→
   550→    echo_plan_context_status(plan_context)
   551→
   552→    return dataclasses.replace(state, plan_context=plan_context)
   553→
   554→
   555→def generate_description(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   556→    """Generate AI PR title and body via CommitMessageGenerator."""
   557→    if state.skip_description:
   558→        return state
   559→    click.echo(click.style("Phase 4: Generating PR description", bold=True))
   560→
   561→    if state.diff_file is None:
   562→        return SubmitError(
   563→            phase="generate_description",
   564→            error_type="no_diff_file",
   565→            message="Failed to extract diff for AI analysis",
   566→            details={},
   567→        )
   568→
   569→    # Get commit messages for AI context
   570→    commit_messages = ctx.git.commit.get_commit_messages_since(state.cwd, state.parent_branch)
   571→
   572→    msg_gen = CommitMessageGenerator(ctx.prompt_executor)
   573→    msg_result = run_commit_message_generation(
   574→        generator=msg_gen,
   575→        diff_file=state.diff_file,
   576→        repo_root=state.repo_root,
   577→        current_branch=state.branch_name,
   578→        parent_branch=state.parent_branch,
   579→        commit_messages=commit_messages,
   580→        plan_context=state.plan_context,
   581→        debug=state.debug,
   582→    )
   583→
   584→    if not msg_result.success:
   585→        return SubmitError(
   586→            phase="generate_description",
   587→            error_type="ai_generation_failed",
   588→            message=f"Failed to generate message: {msg_result.error_message}",
   589→            details={},
   590→        )
   591→
   592→    click.echo("")
   593→
   594→    return dataclasses.replace(
   595→        state,
   596→        title=msg_result.title or "Update",
   597→        body=msg_result.body or "",
   598→    )
   599→
   600→
   601→def enhance_with_graphite(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   602→    """No-op if graphite_url already set. Otherwise check auth + tracking, run gt submit."""
   603→    # Skip if Graphite already handled the push (graphite-first path)
   604→    if state.graphite_url is not None:
   605→        return state
   606→
   607→    # Skip if user disabled Graphite
   608→    if not state.use_graphite:
   609→        return state
   610→
   611→    click.echo(click.style("Phase 5: Graphite enhancement", bold=True))
   612→
   613→    if state.pr_number is None:
   614→        return state
   615→
   616→    # Check Graphite auth
   617→    is_gt_authed, gt_username, _ = ctx.graphite.check_auth_status()
   618→    if not is_gt_authed:
   619→        if state.debug:
   620→            click.echo(click.style("   Graphite not authenticated, skipping enhancement", dim=True))
   621→        click.echo("")
   622→        return state
   623→
   624→    # Check if branch is tracked
   625→    repo_root = state.repo_root
   626→    all_branches = ctx.graphite.get_all_branches(ctx.git, repo_root)
   627→    if state.branch_name not in all_branches:
   628→        if state.debug:
   629→            click.echo(
   630→                click.style("   Branch not tracked by Graphite, skipping enhancement", dim=True)
   631→            )
   632→        click.echo("")
   633→        return state
   634→
   635→    # Run gt submit
   636→    sys.stdout.flush()
   637→    try:
   638→        ctx.graphite.submit_stack(
   639→            repo_root,
   640→            publish=True,
   641→            restack=False,
   642→            quiet=state.quiet,
   643→            force=state.force,
   644→        )
   645→    except RuntimeError as e:
   646→        error_msg = str(e).lower()
   647→        if "nothing to submit" in error_msg or "no changes" in error_msg:
   648→            click.echo(click.style("   PR already up to date with Graphite", fg="green"))
   649→            click.echo("")
   650→            return state
   651→        return SubmitError(
   652→            phase="enhance_with_graphite",
   653→            error_type="graphite_enhance_failed",
   654→            message=f"Graphite enhancement failed: {e}",
   655→            details={},
   656→        )
   657→
   658→    # Get Graphite URL
   659→    remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(repo_root, "origin")
   660→    owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
   661→    repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
   662→    graphite_url: str | None = None
   663→    if state.pr_number is not None:
   664→        graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, state.pr_number)
   665→
   666→    click.echo("")
   667→
   668→    return dataclasses.replace(state, graphite_url=graphite_url)
   669→
   670→
   671→def finalize_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   672→    """Update PR title/body with footer, add labels, amend local commit, clean up diff file."""
   673→    if state.skip_description:
   674→        return state
   675→    click.echo(click.style("Phase 6: Updating PR metadata", bold=True))
   676→
   677→    if state.pr_number is None:
   678→        return SubmitError(
   679→            phase="finalize_pr",
   680→            error_type="no_pr_number",
   681→            message="No PR number available for finalization",
   682→            details={},
   683→        )
   684→
   685→    pr_body = state.body or ""
   686→    pr_title = state.title or "Update"
   687→
   688→    # Use pre-captured PR body (captured before gt submit overwrites it)
   689→    existing_pr_body = state.existing_pr_body
   690→
   691→    # Check learn plan label
   692→    impl_dir = state.cwd / ".impl"
   693→    is_learn_origin = is_learn_plan(impl_dir)
   694→
   695→    # Assemble PR body with plan details and footer
   696→    final_body = assemble_pr_body(
   697→        body=pr_body,
   698→        plan_context=state.plan_context,
   699→        pr_number=state.pr_number,
   700→        header="",
   701→        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
   702→    )
   703→
   704→    # Update PR metadata
   705→    ctx.github.update_pr_title_and_body(
   706→        repo_root=state.repo_root,
   707→        pr_number=state.pr_number,
   708→        title=pr_title,
   709→        body=BodyText(content=final_body),
   710→    )
   711→
   712→    # Publish draft PR if needed
   713→    pr_draft_check = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, state.pr_number)
   714→    if not isinstance(pr_draft_check, PRNotFound) and pr_draft_check.is_draft:
   715→        click.echo(click.style("   Publishing draft PR...", dim=True))
   716→        ctx.github.mark_pr_ready(state.repo_root, state.pr_number)
   717→
   718→    # Add learn skip label if applicable
   719→    if is_learn_origin:
   720→        ctx.github.add_label_to_pr(state.repo_root, state.pr_number, ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL)
   721→
   722→    # Amend local commit with title and body (without metadata footer)
   723→    commit_message = pr_title
   724→    if pr_body:
   725→        commit_message = f"{pr_title}\n\n{pr_body}"
   726→    ctx.git.commit.amend_commit(state.repo_root, commit_message)
   727→
   728→    # Fix Graphite tracking divergence caused by the amend
   729→    if ctx.graphite_branch_ops is not None:
   730→        ctx.graphite_branch_ops.retrack_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
   731→
   732→    # Clean up temp diff file
   733→    if state.diff_file is not None and state.diff_file.exists():
   734→        try:
   735→            state.diff_file.unlink()
   736→        except OSError as e:
   737→            if state.debug:
   738→                click.echo(click.style(f"   Failed to clean up diff file: {e}", dim=True))
   739→
   740→    click.echo(click.style("   PR metadata updated", fg="green"))
   741→
   742→    # Update lifecycle stage for linked plan
   743→    plan_id_for_lifecycle: str | None = None
   744→    if state.plan_context is not None:
   745→        plan_id_for_lifecycle = state.plan_context.plan_id
   746→    elif state.pr_number is not None:
   747→        plan_id_for_lifecycle = str(state.pr_number)
   748→
   749→    if plan_id_for_lifecycle is not None:
   750→        maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl(
   751→            ctx,
   752→            repo_root=state.repo_root,
   753→            plan_id=plan_id_for_lifecycle,
   754→            quiet=state.quiet,
   755→        )
   756→
   757→    click.echo("")
   758→
   759→    # Get final PR URL
   760→    pr_result = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
   761→    pr_url = pr_result.url if not isinstance(pr_result, PRNotFound) else state.pr_url or ""
   762→
   763→    # Get Graphite URL if not already set
   764→    graphite_url = state.graphite_url
   765→    if graphite_url is None and state.use_graphite:
   766→        is_gt_authed, _, _ = ctx.graphite.check_auth_status()
   767→        if is_gt_authed:
   768→            remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(state.repo_root, "origin")
   769→            owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
   770→            repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
   771→            graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, state.pr_number)
   772→
   773→    return dataclasses.replace(
   774→        state,
   775→        pr_url=pr_url,
   776→        graphite_url=graphite_url,
   777→        title=pr_title,
   778→        body=pr_body,
   779→    )
   780→
   781→
   782→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   783→# Helper
   784→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   785→
   786→
   787→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   788→# Pipeline Runner
   789→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   790→
   791→
   792→@cache
   793→def _push_and_create_pipeline() -> tuple[SubmitStep, ...]:
   794→    return (
   795→        prepare_state,
   796→        commit_wip,
   797→        capture_existing_pr_body,
   798→        push_and_create_pr,
   799→    )
   800→
   801→
   802→def run_push_and_create_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   803→    """Run only the push-and-create portion of the submit pipeline."""
   804→    for step in _push_and_create_pipeline():
   805→        try:
   806→            result = step(ctx, state)
   807→        except Exception as e:
   808→            step_name = getattr(step, "__name__", repr(step))
   809→            return SubmitError(
   810→                phase=step_name,
   811→                error_type="unhandled_exception",
   812→                message=f"Unexpected error in {step_name}: {e}",
   813→                details={},
   814→            )
   815→        if isinstance(result, SubmitError):
   816→            return result
   817→        state = result
   818→    return state
   819→
   820→
   821→@cache
   822→def _submit_pipeline() -> tuple[SubmitStep, ...]:
   823→    return (
   824→        prepare_state,
   825→        commit_wip,
   826→        capture_existing_pr_body,
   827→        push_and_create_pr,
   828→        extract_diff,
   829→        fetch_plan_context,
   830→        generate_description,
   831→        enhance_with_graphite,
   832→        finalize_pr,
   833→    )
   834→
   835→
   836→def run_submit_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
   837→    """Run the submit pipeline, returning final state or first error."""
   838→    for step in _submit_pipeline():
   839→        try:
   840→            result = step(ctx, state)
   841→        except Exception as e:
   842→            step_name = getattr(step, "__name__", repr(step))
   843→            return SubmitError(
   844→                phase=step_name,
   845→                error_type="unhandled_exception",
   846→                message=f"Unexpected error in {step_name}: {e}",
   847→                details={},
   848→            )
   849→        if isinstance(result, SubmitError):
   850→            return result
   851→        state = result
   852→    return state
   853→
   854→
   855→def make_initial_state(
   856→    *,
   857→    cwd: Path,
   858→    use_graphite: bool,
   859→    force: bool,
   860→    debug: bool,
   861→    session_id: str | None,
   862→    skip_description: bool,
   863→    quiet: bool,
   864→) -> SubmitState:
   865→    """Create initial SubmitState with only CLI-provided values.
   866→
   867→    All discovery fields start as empty/None and are populated by prepare_state().
   868→    """
   869→    resolved_session_id = session_id if session_id is not None else str(uuid.uuid4())
   870→    return SubmitState(
   871→        cwd=cwd,
   872→        repo_root=cwd,
   873→        branch_name="",
   874→        parent_branch="",
   875→        trunk_branch="",
   876→        use_graphite=use_graphite,
   877→        force=force,
   878→        debug=debug,
   879→        session_id=resolved_session_id,
   880→        skip_description=skip_description,
   881→        quiet=quiet,
   882→        plan_id=None,
   883→        pr_number=None,
   884→        pr_url=None,
   885→        was_created=False,
   886→        base_branch=None,
   887→        graphite_url=None,
   888→        diff_file=None,
   889→        plan_context=None,
   890→        title=None,
   891→        body=None,
   892→        existing_pr_body="",
   893→    )
   894→

"""Linear pipeline for PR submission.

Replaces the dual-path branching orchestration with a sequence of plain
functions transforming a frozen SubmitState dataclass.

Each step: (ErkContext, SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError
"""

import dataclasses
import sys
import uuid
from collections.abc import Callable
from dataclasses import dataclass
from functools import cache
from pathlib import Path

import click

from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import (
    assemble_pr_body,
    echo_plan_context_status,
    maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl,
    run_commit_message_generation,
)
from erk.cli.constants import PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX
from erk.cli.ensure import UserFacingCliError
from erk.core.commit_message_generator import CommitMessageGenerator
from erk.core.context import ErkContext
from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext, PlanContextProvider
from erk_shared.gateway.git.remote_ops.types import PullRebaseError, PushError
from erk_shared.gateway.github.parsing import parse_git_remote_url
from erk_shared.gateway.github.pr_footer import build_pr_body_footer
from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import BodyText, GitHubRepoId, PRNotFound
from erk_shared.gateway.gt.operations.finalize import ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL, is_learn_plan
from erk_shared.gateway.gt.prompts import truncate_diff
from erk_shared.gateway.pr.diff_extraction import filter_diff_excluded_files
from erk_shared.gateway.pr.graphite_enhance import should_enhance_with_graphite
from erk_shared.impl_folder import (
    has_plan_ref,
    save_plan_ref,
    validate_plan_linkage,
)
from erk_shared.scratch.scratch import write_scratch_file

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Utilities
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


def _add_planned_prefix(title: str) -> str:
    """Prepend 'plnd/' prefix to PR title (idempotent).

    Args:
        title: The PR title to prefix

    Returns:
        The title with 'plnd/' prefix, skipping if already prefixed
    """
    if title.startswith(PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX):
        return title
    return f"{PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX}{title}"


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Data Types
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SubmitState:
    """Immutable state threaded through the submit pipeline."""

    cwd: Path
    repo_root: Path
    branch_name: str
    parent_branch: str
    trunk_branch: str
    use_graphite: bool
    force: bool
    debug: bool
    session_id: str
    skip_description: bool
    quiet: bool
    plan_id: str | None
    pr_number: int | None
    pr_url: str | None
    was_created: bool
    base_branch: str | None
    graphite_url: str | None
    diff_file: Path | None
    plan_context: PlanContext | None
    title: str | None
    body: str | None
    existing_pr_body: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SubmitError:
    """Error result from a pipeline step."""

    phase: str
    error_type: str
    message: str
    details: dict[str, str]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pipeline Steps
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

SubmitStep = Callable[[ErkContext, SubmitState], SubmitState | SubmitError]


def prepare_state(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Resolve repo_root, branch_name, parent_branch, trunk_branch, plan_id.

    Single location for all discovery. Consolidates duplicate parent-branch
    and plan-id discovery sites.
    """
    cwd = state.cwd
    repo_root = ctx.git.repo.get_repository_root(cwd)

    branch_name = ctx.git.branch.get_current_branch(cwd)
    if branch_name is None:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="prepare",
            error_type="no_branch",
            message="Not on a branch (detached HEAD state)",
            details={},
        )

    trunk_branch = ctx.git.branch.detect_trunk_branch(repo_root)
    parent_branch = ctx.branch_manager.get_parent_branch(repo_root, branch_name) or trunk_branch

    # Plan ID discovery via .impl/plan-ref.json (or legacy issue.json) or branch name
    impl_dir = cwd / ".impl"
    plan_id: str | None = None
    try:
        plan_id = validate_plan_linkage(impl_dir, branch_name)
    except ValueError as e:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="prepare",
            error_type="issue_linkage_mismatch",
            message=str(e),
            details={"branch": branch_name},
        )

    # Auto-repair: create .impl/plan-ref.json if missing but issue inferred from branch
    if plan_id is not None and not has_plan_ref(impl_dir) and impl_dir.exists():
        remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(repo_root, "origin")
        owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
        issue_url = f"https://github.com/{owner}/{repo_name}/issues/{plan_id}"
        save_plan_ref(
            impl_dir,
            provider="github",
            plan_id=plan_id,
            url=issue_url,
            labels=(),
            objective_id=None,
        )

    return dataclasses.replace(
        state,
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        plan_id=plan_id,
    )


def commit_wip(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Check for uncommitted changes; if present, add_all + commit."""
    if ctx.git.status.has_uncommitted_changes(state.cwd):
        if not state.quiet:
            click.echo(click.style("   Committing uncommitted changes...", dim=True))
        ctx.git.commit.add_all(state.cwd)
        ctx.git.commit.commit(state.cwd, "WIP: Prepare for PR submission")
    return state


def capture_existing_pr_body(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Capture full PR body before gt submit overwrites it."""
    pr_result = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
    if isinstance(pr_result, PRNotFound):
        return state
    if not pr_result.body:
        return state
    return dataclasses.replace(state, existing_pr_body=pr_result.body)


def push_and_create_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Push branch and create/find PR.

    Dispatches internally: Graphite-first vs core path.
    """
    # Determine if Graphite should handle the push
    graphite_handles_push = (
        state.use_graphite and should_enhance_with_graphite(ctx, state.cwd).should_enhance
    )

    if graphite_handles_push:
        return _graphite_first_flow(ctx, state)
    return _core_submit_flow(ctx, state)


def _graphite_first_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Graphite-first flow: gt submit handles push + PR creation."""
    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style("Phase 1: Graphite Submit", bold=True))

    # Auto-force for plan implementations (branches always diverge from remote)
    is_plan_impl = state.plan_id is not None
    effective_force = state.force or is_plan_impl

    # Pre-check: detect remote divergence before gt submit
    if ctx.git.branch.branch_exists_on_remote(state.repo_root, "origin", state.branch_name):
        ctx.git.remote.fetch_branch(state.repo_root, "origin", state.branch_name)
        divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
            state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
        )
        if divergence.behind > 0 and not effective_force:
            ahead_msg = (
                f" and ahead by {divergence.ahead} commit(s)" if divergence.ahead > 0 else ""
            )
            return SubmitError(
                phase="push_and_create_pr",
                error_type="remote_diverged",
                message=(
                    f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' is behind remote by "
                    f"{divergence.behind} commit(s){ahead_msg}.\n\n"
                    "The remote branch has been updated (e.g., by CI or another session).\n\n"
                    "To fix:\n"
                    "  erk pr reconcile-with-remote --dangerous  # Reconcile with remote\n"
                    "  erk pr submit -f                          # Force push"
                ),
                details={
                    "branch": state.branch_name,
                    "ahead": str(divergence.ahead),
                    "behind": str(divergence.behind),
                },
            )
        if is_plan_impl and not state.force and divergence.behind > 0:
            if not state.quiet:
                click.echo(click.style("   Auto-forcing: plan implementation branch", dim=True))

    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style("   Running gt submit...", dim=True))
    sys.stdout.flush()
    try:
        ctx.graphite.submit_stack(
            state.repo_root,
            publish=True,
            restack=False,
            quiet=state.quiet,
            force=effective_force,
        )
    except RuntimeError as e:
        error_str = str(e)
        if "restack" in error_str.lower():
            return SubmitError(
                phase="push_and_create_pr",
                error_type="graphite_restack_required",
                message=(
                    "Your Graphite stack has conflicts that need manual resolution.\n\n"
                    "Run these commands:\n"
                    "  gt restack        # Resolve conflicts interactively\n"
                    "  erk pr submit     # Re-submit after resolving"
                ),
                details={},
            )
        return SubmitError(
            phase="push_and_create_pr",
            error_type="graphite_submit_failed",
            message=f"Graphite submit failed: {e}",
            details={},
        )
    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style("   Graphite submit completed", fg="green"))
        click.echo("")

    # Query GitHub for PR info
    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style("   Getting PR info...", dim=True))
    pr_info = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
    if isinstance(pr_info, PRNotFound):
        return SubmitError(
            phase="push_and_create_pr",
            error_type="pr_not_found",
            message=(
                f"PR not found for branch '{state.branch_name}' after gt submit.\n"
                "This may happen if gt submit didn't create a PR. Try running:\n"
                "  gt submit --publish"
            ),
            details={"branch": state.branch_name},
        )

    # Get Graphite URL
    remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(state.repo_root, "origin")
    owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
    repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
    graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, pr_info.number)

    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_info.number} ready", fg="green"))
        click.echo("")

    return dataclasses.replace(
        state,
        pr_number=pr_info.number,
        pr_url=pr_info.url,
        was_created=True,
        base_branch=state.parent_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
    )


def _core_submit_flow(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Core submit flow: git push + gh pr create."""
    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style("Phase 1: Creating or Updating PR", bold=True))

    # Check GitHub authentication
    is_gh_authed, gh_username, _ = ctx.github.check_auth_status()
    if not is_gh_authed:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="push_and_create_pr",
            error_type="github_auth_failed",
            message="GitHub CLI is not authenticated. Run 'gh auth login'.",
            details={},
        )
    if state.debug and not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style(f"   Authenticated as {gh_username}", dim=True))

    # Verify commits to push
    commit_count = ctx.git.analysis.count_commits_ahead(state.cwd, state.parent_branch)
    if commit_count == 0:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="push_and_create_pr",
            error_type="no_commits",
            message=f"No commits ahead of {state.parent_branch}. Nothing to submit.",
            details={"parent_branch": state.parent_branch, "branch": state.branch_name},
        )

    # Divergence check and auto-rebase
    divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
        state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
    )
    if divergence.behind > 0:
        if state.debug and not state.quiet:
            click.echo(
                click.style(
                    f"   Branch is {divergence.behind} commit(s) behind remote, rebasing...",
                    dim=True,
                )
            )
        pull_result = ctx.git.remote.pull_rebase(state.cwd, "origin", state.branch_name)
        if isinstance(pull_result, PullRebaseError):
            return SubmitError(
                phase="push_and_create_pr",
                error_type="rebase_failed",
                message=(
                    f"Failed to rebase '{state.branch_name}' on origin.\n"
                    f"Error: {pull_result.message}\n\n"
                    f"To fix manually: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}"
                ),
                details={"branch": state.branch_name},
            )
        divergence = ctx.git.branch.is_branch_diverged_from_remote(
            state.cwd, state.branch_name, "origin"
        )

    if divergence.is_diverged and not state.force:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="push_and_create_pr",
            error_type="branch_diverged",
            message=(
                f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' has diverged from remote.\n"
                f"Local is {divergence.ahead} commit(s) ahead and "
                f"{divergence.behind} commit(s) behind origin/{state.branch_name}.\n\n"
                f"To fix: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}\n"
                f"Or use: erk pr submit -f (to force push)"
            ),
            details={
                "branch": state.branch_name,
                "ahead": str(divergence.ahead),
                "behind": str(divergence.behind),
            },
        )

    # Push
    push_result = ctx.git.remote.push_to_remote(
        state.cwd, "origin", state.branch_name, set_upstream=True, force=state.force
    )
    if isinstance(push_result, PushError):
        if "non-fast-forward" in push_result.message or "rejected" in push_result.message.lower():
            return SubmitError(
                phase="push_and_create_pr",
                error_type="branch_diverged",
                message=(
                    f"Branch '{state.branch_name}' has diverged from remote.\n"
                    f"Your local branch is behind origin/{state.branch_name}.\n\n"
                    f"To fix: git pull --rebase origin {state.branch_name}\n"
                    f"Or use: erk pr submit -f (to force push)"
                ),
                details={"branch": state.branch_name},
            )
        raise UserFacingCliError(push_result.message)

    # Check for existing PR or create new one
    existing_pr = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)

    if isinstance(existing_pr, PRNotFound):
        # Check parent branch has PR (stacked PRs)
        if state.parent_branch != state.trunk_branch:
            parent_pr = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.parent_branch)
            if isinstance(parent_pr, PRNotFound):
                return SubmitError(
                    phase="push_and_create_pr",
                    error_type="parent_branch_no_pr",
                    message=(
                        f"Cannot create PR: parent branch '{state.parent_branch}' "
                        f"does not have a PR yet.\n\n"
                        f"This branch is part of a Graphite stack. Use 'gt submit' "
                        f"to submit the entire stack at once, which will create PRs "
                        f"for all branches in the correct order.\n\n"
                        f"Run: gt submit -s"
                    ),
                    details={
                        "branch": state.branch_name,
                        "parent_branch": state.parent_branch,
                    },
                )

        # Build initial PR body with footer
        footer = build_pr_body_footer(0)
        full_body = "" + footer

        pr_number = ctx.github.create_pr(
            state.repo_root,
            branch=state.branch_name,
            title="WIP",
            body=full_body,
            base=state.parent_branch,
        )

        # Get PR URL
        pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, pr_number)
        pr_url = (
            pr_details.url
            if not isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound)
            else f"https://github.com/{state.branch_name}/pull/{pr_number}"
        )

        # Update footer with actual PR number
        updated_footer = build_pr_body_footer(pr_number)
        ctx.github.update_pr_body(state.repo_root, pr_number, "" + updated_footer)

        if not state.quiet:
            click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_number} created", fg="green"))
            click.echo("")

        return dataclasses.replace(
            state,
            pr_number=pr_number,
            pr_url=pr_url,
            was_created=True,
            base_branch=state.parent_branch,
        )

    # PR exists
    pr_number = existing_pr.number
    pr_url = existing_pr.url

    # Add footer if missing
    pr_details = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, pr_number)
    current_body = "" if isinstance(pr_details, PRNotFound) else pr_details.body
    has_footer = "erk pr checkout" in current_body
    if not has_footer:
        footer = build_pr_body_footer(pr_number)
        ctx.github.update_pr_body(state.repo_root, pr_number, current_body + footer)

    if not state.quiet:
        click.echo(click.style(f"   PR #{pr_number} found (already exists)", fg="green"))
        click.echo("")

    return dataclasses.replace(
        state,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=False,
        base_branch=state.parent_branch,
    )


def extract_diff(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Local git diff to base branch, filter lock files, truncate, write scratch file."""
    if state.skip_description:
        return state
    click.echo(click.style("Phase 2: Getting diff", bold=True))

    if state.base_branch is None:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="extract_diff",
            error_type="no_base_branch",
            message="No base branch determined for diff extraction",
            details={},
        )

    pr_diff = ctx.git.analysis.get_diff_to_branch(state.cwd, state.base_branch)
    if state.debug:
        diff_lines = len(pr_diff.splitlines())
        click.echo(click.style(f"   Diff retrieved ({diff_lines} lines)", dim=True))

    # Filter lock files, truncate
    pr_diff = filter_diff_excluded_files(pr_diff)
    diff_content, was_truncated = truncate_diff(pr_diff)
    if was_truncated and state.debug:
        click.echo(click.style("   Diff truncated for size", dim=True))

    # Write scratch file
    diff_file = write_scratch_file(
        diff_content,
        session_id=state.session_id,
        suffix=".diff",
        prefix="pr-diff-",
        repo_root=state.repo_root,
    )

    click.echo("")

    return dataclasses.replace(state, diff_file=diff_file)


def fetch_plan_context(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Fetch plan context from linked erk-plan issue."""
    if state.skip_description:
        return state
    click.echo(click.style("Phase 3: Fetching plan context", bold=True))

    plan_provider = PlanContextProvider(
        plan_backend=ctx.plan_backend, github_issues=ctx.github_issues
    )
    plan_context = plan_provider.get_plan_context(
        repo_root=state.repo_root,
        branch_name=state.branch_name,
    )

    echo_plan_context_status(plan_context)

    return dataclasses.replace(state, plan_context=plan_context)


def generate_description(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Generate AI PR title and body via CommitMessageGenerator."""
    if state.skip_description:
        return state
    click.echo(click.style("Phase 4: Generating PR description", bold=True))

    if state.diff_file is None:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="generate_description",
            error_type="no_diff_file",
            message="Failed to extract diff for AI analysis",
            details={},
        )

    # Get commit messages for AI context
    commit_messages = ctx.git.commit.get_commit_messages_since(state.cwd, state.parent_branch)

    msg_gen = CommitMessageGenerator(ctx.prompt_executor)
    msg_result = run_commit_message_generation(
        generator=msg_gen,
        diff_file=state.diff_file,
        repo_root=state.repo_root,
        current_branch=state.branch_name,
        parent_branch=state.parent_branch,
        commit_messages=commit_messages,
        plan_context=state.plan_context,
        debug=state.debug,
    )

    if not msg_result.success:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="generate_description",
            error_type="ai_generation_failed",
            message=f"Failed to generate message: {msg_result.error_message}",
            details={},
        )

    click.echo("")

    return dataclasses.replace(
        state,
        title=msg_result.title or "Update",
        body=msg_result.body or "",
    )


def enhance_with_graphite(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """No-op if graphite_url already set. Otherwise check auth + tracking, run gt submit."""
    # Skip if Graphite already handled the push (graphite-first path)
    if state.graphite_url is not None:
        return state

    # Skip if user disabled Graphite
    if not state.use_graphite:
        return state

    click.echo(click.style("Phase 5: Graphite enhancement", bold=True))

    if state.pr_number is None:
        return state

    # Check Graphite auth
    is_gt_authed, gt_username, _ = ctx.graphite.check_auth_status()
    if not is_gt_authed:
        if state.debug:
            click.echo(click.style("   Graphite not authenticated, skipping enhancement", dim=True))
        click.echo("")
        return state

    # Check if branch is tracked
    repo_root = state.repo_root
    all_branches = ctx.graphite.get_all_branches(ctx.git, repo_root)
    if state.branch_name not in all_branches:
        if state.debug:
            click.echo(
                click.style("   Branch not tracked by Graphite, skipping enhancement", dim=True)
            )
        click.echo("")
        return state

    # Run gt submit
    sys.stdout.flush()
    try:
        ctx.graphite.submit_stack(
            repo_root,
            publish=True,
            restack=False,
            quiet=state.quiet,
            force=state.force,
        )
    except RuntimeError as e:
        error_msg = str(e).lower()
        if "nothing to submit" in error_msg or "no changes" in error_msg:
            click.echo(click.style("   PR already up to date with Graphite", fg="green"))
            click.echo("")
            return state
        return SubmitError(
            phase="enhance_with_graphite",
            error_type="graphite_enhance_failed",
            message=f"Graphite enhancement failed: {e}",
            details={},
        )

    # Get Graphite URL
    remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(repo_root, "origin")
    owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
    repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
    graphite_url: str | None = None
    if state.pr_number is not None:
        graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, state.pr_number)

    click.echo("")

    return dataclasses.replace(state, graphite_url=graphite_url)


def finalize_pr(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Update PR title/body with footer, add labels, amend local commit, clean up diff file."""
    if state.skip_description:
        return state
    click.echo(click.style("Phase 6: Updating PR metadata", bold=True))

    if state.pr_number is None:
        return SubmitError(
            phase="finalize_pr",
            error_type="no_pr_number",
            message="No PR number available for finalization",
            details={},
        )

    pr_body = state.body or ""
    pr_title = state.title or "Update"

    # Use pre-captured PR body (captured before gt submit overwrites it)
    existing_pr_body = state.existing_pr_body

    # Check learn plan label
    impl_dir = state.cwd / ".impl"
    is_learn_origin = is_learn_plan(impl_dir)

    # Assemble PR body with plan details and footer
    final_body = assemble_pr_body(
        body=pr_body,
        plan_context=state.plan_context,
        pr_number=state.pr_number,
        header="",
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
    )

    # Update PR metadata
    ctx.github.update_pr_title_and_body(
        repo_root=state.repo_root,
        pr_number=state.pr_number,
        title=pr_title,
        body=BodyText(content=final_body),
    )

    # Publish draft PR if needed
    pr_draft_check = ctx.github.get_pr(state.repo_root, state.pr_number)
    if not isinstance(pr_draft_check, PRNotFound) and pr_draft_check.is_draft:
        click.echo(click.style("   Publishing draft PR...", dim=True))
        ctx.github.mark_pr_ready(state.repo_root, state.pr_number)

    # Add learn skip label if applicable
    if is_learn_origin:
        ctx.github.add_label_to_pr(state.repo_root, state.pr_number, ERK_SKIP_LEARN_LABEL)

    # Amend local commit with title and body (without metadata footer)
    commit_message = pr_title
    if pr_body:
        commit_message = f"{pr_title}\n\n{pr_body}"
    ctx.git.commit.amend_commit(state.repo_root, commit_message)

    # Fix Graphite tracking divergence caused by the amend
    if ctx.graphite_branch_ops is not None:
        ctx.graphite_branch_ops.retrack_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)

    # Clean up temp diff file
    if state.diff_file is not None and state.diff_file.exists():
        try:
            state.diff_file.unlink()
        except OSError as e:
            if state.debug:
                click.echo(click.style(f"   Failed to clean up diff file: {e}", dim=True))

    click.echo(click.style("   PR metadata updated", fg="green"))

    # Update lifecycle stage for linked plan
    plan_id_for_lifecycle: str | None = None
    if state.plan_context is not None:
        plan_id_for_lifecycle = state.plan_context.plan_id
    elif state.pr_number is not None:
        plan_id_for_lifecycle = str(state.pr_number)

    if plan_id_for_lifecycle is not None:
        maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl(
            ctx,
            repo_root=state.repo_root,
            plan_id=plan_id_for_lifecycle,
            quiet=state.quiet,
        )

    click.echo("")

    # Get final PR URL
    pr_result = ctx.github.get_pr_for_branch(state.repo_root, state.branch_name)
    pr_url = pr_result.url if not isinstance(pr_result, PRNotFound) else state.pr_url or ""

    # Get Graphite URL if not already set
    graphite_url = state.graphite_url
    if graphite_url is None and state.use_graphite:
        is_gt_authed, _, _ = ctx.graphite.check_auth_status()
        if is_gt_authed:
            remote_url = ctx.git.remote.get_remote_url(state.repo_root, "origin")
            owner, repo_name = parse_git_remote_url(remote_url)
            repo_id = GitHubRepoId(owner=owner, repo=repo_name)
            graphite_url = ctx.graphite.get_graphite_url(repo_id, state.pr_number)

    return dataclasses.replace(
        state,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        title=pr_title,
        body=pr_body,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pipeline Runner
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@cache
def _push_and_create_pipeline() -> tuple[SubmitStep, ...]:
    return (
        prepare_state,
        commit_wip,
        capture_existing_pr_body,
        push_and_create_pr,
    )


def run_push_and_create_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Run only the push-and-create portion of the submit pipeline."""
    for step in _push_and_create_pipeline():
        try:
            result = step(ctx, state)
        except Exception as e:
            step_name = getattr(step, "__name__", repr(step))
            return SubmitError(
                phase=step_name,
                error_type="unhandled_exception",
                message=f"Unexpected error in {step_name}: {e}",
                details={},
            )
        if isinstance(result, SubmitError):
            return result
        state = result
    return state


@cache
def _submit_pipeline() -> tuple[SubmitStep, ...]:
    return (
        prepare_state,
        commit_wip,
        capture_existing_pr_body,
        push_and_create_pr,
        extract_diff,
        fetch_plan_context,
        generate_description,
        enhance_with_graphite,
        finalize_pr,
    )


def run_submit_pipeline(ctx: ErkContext, state: SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError:
    """Run the submit pipeline, returning final state or first error."""
    for step in _submit_pipeline():
        try:
            result = step(ctx, state)
        except Exception as e:
            step_name = getattr(step, "__name__", repr(step))
            return SubmitError(
                phase=step_name,
                error_type="unhandled_exception",
                message=f"Unexpected error in {step_name}: {e}",
                details={},
            )
        if isinstance(result, SubmitError):
            return result
        state = result
    return state


def make_initial_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    use_graphite: bool,
    force: bool,
    debug: bool,
    session_id: str | None,
    skip_description: bool,
    quiet: bool,
) -> SubmitState:
    """Create initial SubmitState with only CLI-provided values.

    All discovery fields start as empty/None and are populated by prepare_state().
    """
    resolved_session_id = session_id if session_id is not None else str(uuid.uuid4())
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=cwd,
        branch_name="",
        parent_branch="",
        trunk_branch="",
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=resolved_session_id,
        skip_description=skip_description,
        quiet=quiet,
        plan_id=None,
        pr_number=None,
        pr_url=None,
        was_created=False,
        base_branch=None,
        graphite_url=None,
        diff_file=None,
        plan_context=None,
        title=None,
        body=None,
        existing_pr_body="",
    )

   222→@click.command("view")
   223→@click.argument("identifier", type=str, required=False, default=None)
   224→@click.option("--full", "-f", is_flag=True, help="Show full plan body")
   225→@click.pass_obj
   226→def pr_view(ctx: ErkContext, identifier: str | None, *, full: bool) -> None:
   227→    """Fetch and display a plan by identifier.
   228→
   229→    IDENTIFIER can be a plain number (e.g., "42") or a GitHub issue URL
   230→    (e.g., "https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123").
   231→
   232→    If not provided, infers the plan number from the current branch name
   233→    (e.g., via .impl/plan-ref.json on the current branch).
   234→
   235→    By default, shows only header information. Use --full to display
   236→    the complete plan body.
   237→    """
   238→    repo = discover_repo_context(ctx, ctx.cwd)
   239→    ensure_erk_metadata_dir(repo)  # Ensure erk metadata directories exist
   240→    repo_root = repo.root  # Use git repository root for GitHub operations
   241→
   242→    # Resolve plan: explicit argument or infer from branch
   243→    if identifier is not None:
   244→        plan_number = parse_issue_identifier(identifier)
   245→        if plan_number is None:
   246→            user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Invalid identifier: {identifier}")
   247→            raise SystemExit(1)
   248→        result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo_root, str(plan_number))
   249→        plan_id = str(plan_number)
   250→    else:
   251→        # Try to infer from current branch
   252→        branch = ctx.git.branch.get_current_branch(ctx.cwd)
   253→        if branch is None:
   254→            user_output(
   255→                click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
   256→                + "No identifier specified and could not infer from branch name"
   257→            )
   258→            user_output("Usage: erk pr view <identifier>")
   259→            user_output("Or run from a plan branch with .impl/plan-ref.json")
   260→            raise SystemExit(1)
   261→        result = ctx.plan_backend.get_plan_for_branch(repo_root, branch)
   262→        plan_id = ctx.plan_backend.resolve_plan_id_for_branch(repo_root, branch)
   263→        if plan_id is None:
   264→            user_output(
   265→                click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
   266→                + "No identifier specified and could not infer from branch name"
   267→            )
   268→            user_output("Usage: erk pr view <identifier>")
   269→            user_output("Or run from a plan branch with .impl/plan-ref.json")
   270→            raise SystemExit(1)
   271→
   272→    if isinstance(result, PlanNotFound):
   273→        user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Issue #{plan_id} not found")
   274→        raise SystemExit(1)
   275→    plan = result
   276→
   277→    # Extract header info via plan_backend for branch display and later header section
   278→    all_meta = ctx.plan_backend.get_all_metadata_fields(repo_root, plan_id)
   279→    if isinstance(all_meta, PlanNotFound):
   280→        header_info: dict[str, object] = {}
   281→    else:
   282→        header_info = all_meta
   283→
   284→    # Display plan details with consistent formatting
   285→    user_output("")
   286→    user_output(_format_field("Title", click.style(plan.title, bold=True)))
   287→
   288→    # Display metadata with clickable ID
   289→    state_color = "green" if plan.state.value == "OPEN" else "red"
   290→    user_output(_format_field("State", click.style(plan.state.value, fg=state_color)))
   291→
   292→    # Make ID clickable using OSC 8 if URL is available
   293→    id_text = f"#{plan_id}"
   294→    if plan.url:
   295→        colored_id = click.style(id_text, fg="cyan")
   296→        clickable_id = f"\033]8;;{plan.url}\033\\{colored_id}\033]8;;\033\\"
   297→    else:
   298→        clickable_id = click.style(id_text, fg="cyan")
   299→    user_output(_format_field("ID", clickable_id))
   300→    user_output(_format_field("URL", plan.url or "-"))
   301→
   302→    # Display branch if available from plan-header
   303→    branch_name = header_info.get(BRANCH_NAME)
   304→    if branch_name:
   305→        user_output(_format_field("Branch", str(branch_name)))
   306→
   307→    # Display labels
   308→    if plan.labels:
   309→        labels_str = ", ".join(
   310→            click.style(f"[{label}]", fg="bright_magenta") for label in plan.labels
   311→        )
   312→        user_output(_format_field("Labels", labels_str))
   313→
   314→    # Display assignees
   315→    if plan.assignees:
   316→        assignees_str = ", ".join(plan.assignees)
   317→        user_output(_format_field("Assignees", assignees_str))
   318→
   319→    # Display timestamps
   320→    created = plan.created_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
   321→    updated = plan.updated_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
   322→    user_output(_format_field("Created", created))
   323→    user_output(_format_field("Updated", updated))
   324→
   325→    # Display header info section
   326→    header_lines = _format_header_section(header_info, plan_url=plan.url)
   327→    for line in header_lines:
   328→        user_output(line)
   329→
   330→    # Display body only with --full flag
   331→    if full and plan.body:
   332→        user_output("")
   333→        user_output(click.style("─── Plan ───", bold=True))
   334→        user_output(plan.body)
   335→
